title: deep-audit plan (v1)
description: Canonical contract for the /deep-audit plan artifact (reviews/audit-plan-<date>.json). The JSON IS the plan — the markdown consult view is derived from it and regenerated on divergence. The canonical contract gate = this schema PLUS the named plan semantic check (row-identity uniqueness; totals.runs and totals.estTokens equal the row sums) which Draft-7 cannot express — both must pass before the view derives. planVersion is pinned so the engine story and the eventual differential (C-ledger) mode extend this contract only via an explicit version bump. All properties are required (the repo's schema convention).

scope.description: Unit-group path, subsystem:<dir>, app, a glob, or '*'.

compiledAt.description: ISO compile instant, minted once per invocation. Its <YYYY-MM-DD>T<HHMMSS> form is the artifact filename key, so every invocation writes a unique path and can never overwrite an earlier (possibly approved) plan; consult edits rewrite this same artifact rather than re-minting. Distinct from source.evaluatedAt, which is the signal cutoff.

target.description: Absolute path of the audited repo root.

source.description: Source snapshot binding: one approval ↔ one code state ↔ one signal window. Every time-relative predicate (churn) derives from evaluatedAt, never from run time. The engine MUST fail closed if the target's revision/tree no longer matches.

revision.description: git rev-parse HEAD at compile time.

dirty.description: Whether the working tree had uncommitted changes at compile time.

evaluatedAt.description: ISO evaluation cutoff; the churn window is the 90 days ending here.

profile.description: Detection snapshot carried from /dev-audit steps 1–2 (ecosystems, frameworks, tests, CI, secret signals — redacted, domain, Table B tier). Free-form object; informational.

unitMap.description: Deterministic unit groups with their fixed-predicate signals.

group.description: Top-level (or split second-level) directory path, or (root).

chunkUnits.description: Chunk-adjusted unit count (files >400 LOC count as ceil(LOC/400)). Must equal |unitIds| (plan semantic check).

unitIds.description: The group's stable unit IDs, lexicographically ordered: repo-relative file paths; chunked files as path#1..#n. The ID registry rows and the engine address; also the pinned sampling input for light-depth rows.

rows.description: The plan. One row per (lens, altitude, scope) identity — uniqueness is enforced by the plan semantic check. The oneOf branches pin Table L's per-lens altitude pairings: a lens can only appear at the altitudes the catalog allows.

unitIds.description: The exact ordered units this row runs — the engine executes these, never re-derives. standard/deep: the scope's full ordered list; light: the pinned every-3rd sample (indices 0,3,6,…) of it. Consistency with runs/units is the plan semantic check.

runs.description: units × depth factor (light ceil(units/3), standard units, deep 2×units).

omissionRisk.description: One line: what goes unexamined if this row is cut.

why.description: Accumulated Table P rule reasons and/or patches, e.g. 'P8: legacy', 'patch: security-data-loss:standard (add)'.

overrides.description: Told-edits as a DISCRIMINATED PATCH UNION by op — the schema rejects op/payload mismatches (no depth on remove/restrict; depth required on set-depth; add carries a complete rowIntent, no selector). Glob patches (exclude/only) apply before unit-map compilation; row patches after Phase C, in array order. The approved plan is replayable from repo state + these patches; direct consult edits use the same union (source: consult). Empty array when none.

token.description: The CLI token as given; null for a direct consult edit.

rowIntent.description: Complete row-intent: unitIds/units/runs/estTokens/omissionRisk derive deterministically via steps 2+5 at replay.

runs.description: Must equal Σ rows[].runs (plan semantic check).

estTokens.description: Must equal Σ rows[].estTokens (plan semantic check).

assumptions.description: Every pricing constant, printed: per-run tokens, concurrency, per-run minutes, chunk size, churn window/threshold.

notCovered.description: Explicit exclusions: excluded globs, dropped lenses/altitudes, non-code groups, L0 reserved.
